summary: Ran the full flow requested. TEST A (ADD child): PASS — a fresh QAKid1784673895 (DOB 2012-05-15, Male) was added on the parent, persisted to 3 children after page reload, and appeared on the manager Members list (Total Members = 3, Dashboard shows Total Members = 3, Members table shows amu + john + QAKid1784673895). TEST C (real notifications): PASS — parent Notifications tab shows only real items ('Membership payment due for July 2026' + 'Welcome to the new season!' announcement). None of the banned placeholder strings ('Neptune BC', 'Tuesday training has been moved', 'fundraising event on 25 February', 'monthly membership payment of €50') are present. Mark as Read/Unread toggles the unread badge (2->1->2). Delete removes the item and the item stays removed after switching to My Dashboard and back. localStorage keys dlbc_player_notif_read and dlbc_player_notif_deleted are used correctly. TEST D (regression): PASS — manager Members list still renders existing members without errors and the manager notification bell opens a popover with real (payments-derived) content — currently 'No notifications' because overdue=0. TEST B (DELETE child + save persists and disappears on manager): FAIL — after clicking Remove on the newly added child and clicking Save children, the local dlbc_players correctly writes [amu, john] (3 writes captured, all with 2 kids), no error is shown, and the form collapses to 2 child cards. However, after a page reload the deleted child REAPPEARS in registeredChildren (back to 3: amu, john, QAKid1784673895) and 'My Children' on the dashboard shows all 3. On the manager side, after login + 18s wait + reload, the Members list STILL shows QAKid1784673895 with Total Members = 3. So the deletion never propagates and gets reverted on reload — the exact 'stale metadata revert' class of bug the review claimed was fixed.

ui_bugs.component: ProfileTab.handleSaveChildren / syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata (src/lib/clubData.ts) OR pullRemoteAppState + mergeContributionIntoPlayers on parent reload (src/lib/clubData.ts)
ui_bugs.issue: Deleting a child + Save children does not survive a page reload on the parent. On save, localStorage.dlbc_players correctly writes [amu, john] (verified via monkey-patched setItem: 3 writes, all with kids=['amu','john']). After a full page reload, parent.registeredChildren is back to [amu, john, QAKid1784673895]. The child also stays on the manager Members list (Total Members remains 3 after ~20s + reload). Root cause is one of two upstream sources overwriting local on reload: (a) syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata is still restoring the stale 3-child auth.user_metadata onto the freshly-loaded (momentarily empty) local players — the 'only restore when local is empty' rule fires during the render window right after page load when localStorage has been read but the parent object hasn't been populated yet with the deletion; OR (b) mergeContributionIntoPlayers is not actually dropping the removed child because handleSaveChildren didn't push the deletion to dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> in Supabase (the contribution key still holds 3 children). The claim 'DROPS child rows the contribution no longer includes' therefore doesn't help if the parent never wrote the shrunken contribution in the first place. Please verify (1) that handleSaveChildren issues a pushMemberRosterContribution AFTER delete, and (2) that syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata does not run before the local dlbc_players has been rehydrated on first mount. Suggested fixes: (i) after deletion, explicitly call pushMemberRosterContribution(playerId, [amu, john]) so the Supabase row shrinks; (ii) also proactively write the updated registeredChildren into supabase.auth.updateUser({data:{registeredChildren:…}}) so auth metadata cannot reintroduce the deleted child; (iii) add a per-owner monotonic client-side timestamp so 'local-wins' logic can prefer the freshest write regardless of size.

integration_issues.flow: Parent deletes a registered child via Profile > Registered children > Remove > Save children -> manager Members list should drop the row
integration_issues.issue: Deletion NEVER propagates. Parent shows delete succeeded momentarily (kids=2 locally), but on reload the child returns (kids=3). Manager Members list stays at Total Members=3 with the deleted QAKid1784673895 still shown. This is the exact 'delete + save doesn't actually work' bug the review request asked us to verify.

action_items: P0: Make TEST B pass — the delete must survive parent reload AND propagate to the manager Members list. Two-pronged fix: (a) in ProfileTab.handleSaveChildren, after updateRegisteredChildren for a delete, also call supabase.auth.updateUser({data:{registeredChildren: nextChildren}}) BEFORE returning — otherwise auth.user_metadata still holds the deleted child and syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata will revive it on next mount (auth metadata is currently the source-of-truth for 'restore from auth when local empty'). (b) explicitly push an updated dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> row containing the shrunken registeredChildren (or make sure syncKeyToRemote for dlbc_players routes through pushMemberRosterContribution for members on every save, not just adds). Then verify: parent reload keeps 2 kids; manager reload after ~15s shows Total Members=2 with no QAKid row.

P1: In syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata (src/lib/clubData.ts), also skip when auth.user_metadata.registeredChildren has MORE entries than local but the local dlbc_players row was written recently (add an updated_at millisecond timestamp on the parent Player object and prefer whichever side is newer, rather than 'local wins only when empty'). This is the safest way to end this recurring revert race.

P2 (cleanup — after B is fixed): remove the QAKid1784673895 seed row that got re-added — the parent's live dlbc_players still has this test child. Either the fix will drop it automatically, or the test parent can Remove + Save it again once the delete flow is repaired.

P3: src/pages/PlayerDashboard.tsx (2000+ lines) and src/lib/clubData.ts (2400+ lines) exceed the 700-line guideline — splitting ProfileTab and the sync layer would make these races easier to reason about.
critical_code_review_comments: Whichever fix landed for add is asymmetric with delete: the add flow correctly writes both dlbc_players locally AND the roster-contrib row remotely (proof: QAKid1784673895 shows up on the manager Members list within the 12s aggregation window, and it survives parent reload). But the delete flow never removes the child from auth.user_metadata and (apparently) never re-pushes a shrunken roster-contrib row, so on next mount the sync layer restores the deleted child from auth metadata / Supabase. The 'local-wins-unless-empty' rule inside syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata is fragile: during React strict-mode / initial mount there is a window where localStorage has been read but the merged players array hasn't been reconstructed with the parent's row yet, and 'local empty' can be true transiently — auth metadata then wins and re-injects the deleted child.

The three localStorage writes captured on Save-delete are all identical ([amu, john]) — good, no immediate revert this time — meaning the previous storage-event race that caused iteration_2 add-side failure IS fixed. The remaining bug appears strictly on the RELOAD path, not the immediate save path.

Notification implementation is clean: real data derives from getAnnouncements() + payment status (July 2026 fee due) + next session, and read/deleted ids persist in dlbc_player_notif_read / dlbc_player_notif_deleted. No hardcoded placeholder strings remain.

Manager 'Recent activity' section legitimately shows 'Match scheduled: vs Neptune BC' — this is a real seeded fixture in dlbc_matches, NOT a leftover placeholder. Confirmed by cross-checking that the banned notification string 'Neptune BC as a match on Tuesday' is absent.

success_rate.frontend: 75% — TEST A pass, TEST C pass, TEST D pass, TEST B fails (deletion doesn't persist across reload nor propagate to manager)

test_credentials: Parent: cooler74.ea@gmail.com / test12 (now has 3 registered children: amu, john, QAKid1784673895 — the 3rd was added by TEST A and re-appeared after TEST B tried to delete it). Manager: manager@dublinlions.ie / lions2025. Both work.
seed_data_creation: Added child QAKid1784673895 (dob 2012-05-15, Male) for TEST A. This child PERSISTED (still visible on parent and manager after all tests) because TEST B's delete did not stick.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add case is FIXED (persists to parent + shows on manager within ~15s + Total Members increments). Notifications are FIXED (real data only, no placeholders, read/delete toggles work, both parent tab and manager bell). Delete case is STILL BROKEN — parent's local dlbc_players correctly drops the child on Save (3 writes of [amu, john] captured), but on page reload the child returns (dlbc_players parent kids back to [amu, john, QAKid1784673895]) and the manager Members list keeps showing 3. Suspect: (a) auth.user_metadata.registeredChildren not updated on delete, so syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata revives; (b) dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> in Supabase not shrunken on delete, so mergeContributionIntoPlayers doesn't drop anything. Recommend re-running TEST B with the parent's auth metadata being explicitly updated in handleSaveChildren for both add AND delete. When retesting after fix: (1) parent reload after delete should show 2 kids; (2) manager Members should drop to Total Members=2 and QAKid1784673895 should be absent within ~15s or on reload.
rca_of_the_issue: REPRODUCTION (TEST B, confirmed once with monkey-patched localStorage.setItem logging): 1) Login as parent cooler74.ea@gmail.com. 2) Open Manage children. 3) Click Remove on the QAKid1784673895 card. 4) Click Save children. Result: no visible error, 3 localStorage.setItem('dlbc_players', …) writes captured, ALL of them contain only [amu, john] (deletion applied locally). Parent's My Children card, after this tick, shows 2 kids. 5) Reload the page. Result: parent.registeredChildren now [amu, john, QAKid1784673895] — the deleted child is back, and 'My Children' on the dashboard shows 3 rows again. 6) Login as manager, wait 18s, open Members, reload. Result: Members list still shows QAKid1784673895 (Total Members = 3). HYPOTHESIS (needs code confirmation): The delete path does not (a) call supabase.auth.updateUser to shrink registeredChildren in the auth metadata, and/or (b) push a shrunken dlbc_roster_contrib:<uid> row to Supabase. On the next mount, either syncRegisteredChildrenFromAuthMetadata (source = stale auth metadata with 3 kids) or pullRemoteAppState + mergeContributionIntoPlayers (source = stale Supabase contribution with 3 kids) rehydrates the deleted child. Because it comes back BEFORE the user can push another save, the manager view never sees the deletion either. MITIGATION: in handleSaveChildren for the DELETE case, mirror the ADD path exactly — after updateRegisteredChildren, await supabase.auth.updateUser({data:{registeredChildren:next}}) AND call pushMemberRosterContribution(playerId, next). Then reconfirm on manager side within 15s.
